# OpenGlaze

> Open-source ceramic glaze calculator, UMF analyzer, CTE estimator, and recipe manager.

OpenGlaze helps potters, ceramic artists, studios, and educators calculate glaze chemistry, manage recipes, estimate thermal expansion, and self-host their studio glaze database.

## Use cases
- Ceramic glaze calculation
- Unity Molecular Formula analysis
- CTE/crazing/shivering risk estimation
- Self-hosted glaze recipe management
- Pottery studio material tracking
- Glazy companion / alternative workflows

## Key paths
- `README.md`: public overview and quick start
- `docs/`: documentation and screenshots
- `templates/`: UI templates
- `server.py`: local application entry point

## Keywords
ceramic glaze calculator, UMF calculator, glaze chemistry software, pottery recipe manager, CTE glaze calculator, self-hosted ceramics software, Glazy alternative, open-source pottery app.
